paper_or_dataset: Kindrick 2026 PC3 hypoxia RNA-seq source data
hypoxia_modality: 0.5% O2 hypoxia versus 21% O2 normoxia for 16 h
notes: Independent article source-data workbook for hypoxia-regulated RNA-seq in PC3 cells. Article states RNA-seq was performed with four biological replicates per oxygen condition and DESeq2 was used for fold-change estimation; source data provide gene-level replicate values, log2 fold-change, and adjusted p-values. Nominal p-values are absent, so adjusted p-values are used conservatively as p surrogates.

paper_or_dataset: Kindrick 2026 HCT116 hypoxia RNA-seq source data
hypoxia_modality: 0.5% O2 hypoxia versus 21% O2 normoxia for 16 h
notes: Independent article source-data workbook for hypoxia-regulated RNA-seq in HCT116 cells. Article states RNA-seq was performed with three biological replicates per oxygen condition and DESeq2 was used for fold-change estimation; source data provide gene-level replicate values, log2 fold-change, and adjusted p-values. Nominal p-values are absent, so adjusted p-values are used conservatively as p surrogates. The shared source_family_id prevents paper-family overcounting.

handling_decision: FTP listing exposes a gene-count matrix only; no as-deposited contrast-level DEG table with gene, effect, and p/FDR fields was found.
FTP listing exposes raw FPKM/TPM/read-count workbook and mapping summaries only; no contrast-level LFC plus p/FDR table was found.
FTP listing exposes a counts file only; no as-deposited strict S0 DEG statistics table was found.

contrast_or_sheet: Table S1 significant differential gene expression
hypoxia_modality: 1% O2 hypoxia versus normoxia for 24 h
notes: Article supplement table is direct hypoxia-vs-normoxia DESeq2 evidence but lists 2,778 significant genes only, below the full/near-full gene-universe threshold for strict S0.
